trending_videos.title: NCAAW Elite Eight: TCU vs. South Carolina
trending_videos.description: The South Carolina Gamecocks face the TCU Horned Frogs in the Elite Eight of the 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament. South Carolina defeated Oklahoma with a 94-68 win, while TCU advanced with a 79-69 victory against Virginia.

trending_videos.title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of

trending_videos.title: Pittsburgh Pirates at Cincinnati Reds
trending_videos.description: The Pirates visit Great American Ball Park to face the Reds. Paul Skenes is the rotation cornerstone. Elly De La Cruz is a dynamic star looking to build on 22 home runs and 86 RBIs from 2025. The three-game series begins in Cincinnati.

trending_videos.title: Detroit Pistons at Oklahoma City Thunder
trending_videos.description: The Pistons visit Oklahoma City to play the Thunder at Paycom Center. Detroit leads the series 1-0. As the NBA season nears its end, the Pistons face the Thunder again. Detroit won on Feb. 25 behind 29 points from All-Star center Jalen Duren.

trending_videos.title: Noah Kahan: Out of Body | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
After rocketing to global fame, singer-songwriter Noah Kahan faces the pressure of what comes next. Buoyed by his uncanny wit, he returns to his Vermont roots and family to get back in tune with himself in this candid documentary. Watch Noah Kahan: Out of Body – only on Netflix April 13.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82161512

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Noah Kahan: Out of Body | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

content_strategy_insights: Leveraging popular franchises and IPs (e.g., Avengers, Supergirl) can drive high viewer interest.
Sports content continues to attract a dedicated audience, especially during key events.
News and political shows maintain consistent viewership, indicating a stable demand for daily updates.

emerging_trends: Increased interest in unique horror and thriller content, as observed with Backrooms.
Growing demand for female-centric sports coverage, highlighted by NCAAW content.
recommendations: Invest in high-quality trailers for upcoming movies or series to capture initial viewer interest.
Collaborate with sports leagues or teams to create exclusive content around major sporting events.
Develop news content that provides unique perspectives or insider insights to differentiate from mainstream offerings.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
